s: Conference program for the Winterkongress 2026 of digital society
d:
Winterkongress 2026 Schedule Winterkongress of digital society on February 20 and 21 2026 Winterkongress is a co-production of Rote Fabrik and digital society. We thank all supporters cordially! https://winterkongress.ch/2026/ App features
  • View program by day and rooms (side by side)
  • Custom grid layout for smartphones (try landscape mode) and tablets
  • Read detailed descriptions (speaker names, start time, room name, links, ...) of sessions
  • Search and filter through all sessions
  • Add sessions to favourites list
  • Export favourites list
  • Setup alarms for individual sessions
  • Add sessions to your personal calendar
  • Share a website link to an session with others
  • Keep track of program changes
  • Automatic program updates (configurable in settings)
  • Automatically open sessions from web links
🤝 You can help to translate the app at: https://crowdin.com/project/eventfahrplan 💡 Questions regarding the content can only be answered by the content team of digital society. This app simply offers a way to consume and personalise the conference schedule. 💣 Bug reports are very welcome. It would be awesome if you can describe how to reproduce the particular error. Please use the GitHub issue tracker https://github.com/DigitaleGesellschaft/EventFahrplan/issues. 🎨 Digital society. Design by studio kollygujer
